evals.prompt: I need to set up a new project for the MICCAI 2026 paper on cardiac segmentation using foundation models. The submission deadline is June 15. The main tasks will be: collecting CMR data from UK Biobank and Yale, training segmentation models, and writing the paper. Can you set this up?
evals.expected_output: Project note created in projects/ with proper frontmatter (title, deadline, tags including project/2026-MICCAI and venue/miccai, status active). Body has Objective, Key Milestones, and Current Status sections. At least the high-level tasks should be created as task notes linked to the project.

evals.prompt: The combined UKBB+Yale training run finished. Here are the results: Dice LV=0.941, RV=0.915, HD95 LV=3.4mm, RV=4.1mm. I used nnU-Net 3D, batch 4, lr 1e-3, 500 epochs on the combined dataset. The Yale data helped RV but LV slightly regressed compared to run-047 (Dice LV=0.943). I think we need to standardize the spatial resolution across datasets before combining them. This is for the MICCAI segmentation project.
evals.expected_output: Finds/creates the training task and appends results to its Log. Also updates (or creates) an experiment log with a new run entry including config, metrics, and notes. Best Result table updated if applicable. Suggests or creates a follow-up task for resolution standardization. Contexts and tags properly inferred (experiment, model/segmentation, source/ukbb, source/yale).

evals.prompt: I just finished downloading and converting all the UK Biobank cine CMR data. We now have 45,000 subjects in NIfTI format at /data/ukbb/processed/cine/. 150 subjects failed conversion due to corrupt DICOM headers — I logged those in /data/ukbb/logs/failures.csv. Next step is running QC. Can you update the data log and mark the download task as done?
evals.expected_output: Updates (or creates) a data log for CMR Cine UKBB with Current State table showing the conversion as complete (45,000 subjects, location, date) and QC as pending. Adds a changelog entry. Completes the download task with a Summary section. May create a follow-up QC task. Tags include log/data, modality/cine, source/ukbb.
